occupation_definition: Operate or tend equipment to control chemical changes or reactions in the processing of industrial or consumer products. Equipment used includes devulcanizers, steam-jacketed kettles, and reactor vessels. Excludes “Chemical Plant and System Operators” (51-8091).

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Chemical Processing Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders

siblings.occupation_title: Separating, Filtering, Clarifying, Precipitating, and Still Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders
